CustomField.description: Number of days a Failed SyncItem__c (with retries exhausted) can sit before the auto-dismissal job marks it Dismissed. Dismissed items remain queryable but stop dragging down Sync Health %. Set to 0 or leave blank to disable auto-aging — manual dismissal still works.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days a Failed sync item ages before auto-dismissal. 0 or blank = disabled. Default 30.
CustomField.label: Failed Sync Auto-Dismiss Days
